rationale: PM fallback approves the additive Pantry integrity repair after the exact Judge timed out. Exact/approximate measurement is mutually exclusive in Zod and migration 0017 triggers with existing-row validation; undo snapshots include product/source links and use deterministic batch sequence; product archival is blocked in service and SQLite when active stock exists; FEFO uses effective opened shelf life and checks each optimistic update. Focused and full tests, lint, TypeScript, formatting, diff checks, and fresh migration pass. Production build remains an explicit shared-.next environmental gate for final verification.

worker_package.objective: Deliver recipe availability and projected meal demand on the repaired Pantry foundation: actor-attributed manual ingredient-to-product mappings that preserve recipe text; serving-scaled per-recipe availability with ready/partial/unknown states and exact explainability; aggregate multi-meal demand that allocates compatible exact stock only once without consuming it; visible Pantry status on recipe cards/detail/cook surfaces and an explainable demand panel in the planner; validated trusted-origin APIs, focused tests, and docs. Preserve all concurrent nutrition/reaction/planner behavior.
verify: pnpm exec prettier --check src/lib/domain/pantry-availability.ts src/lib/services/pantry-availability-service.ts src/app/api/v1/pantry/mappings src/app/api/v1/pantry/recipes src/app/api/v1/pantry/demand src/components/pantry-availability-pill.tsx src/components/pantry-availability-pill.module.css src/components/recipe-pantry-panel.tsx src/components/recipe-pantry-panel.module.css src/components/meal-plan-pantry-demand.tsx src/components/meal-plan-pantry-demand.module.css src/components/recipe-summary-card.tsx src/app/recipes/page.tsx src/app/recipes/[recipeId]/page.tsx src/app/recipes/[recipeId]/cook/page.tsx src/app/planner/page.tsx tests/unit/pantry-availability.test.ts tests/integration/pantry-availability-service.test.ts docs/openapi.yaml docs/api.md docs/data-model.md docs/decisions/0029-pantry-availability-and-demand.md
pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-availability.test.ts
stop_if: Implementation would rewrite original recipe ingredient text or recipe revisions instead of adding/removing mapping rows.
Unknown, approximate, missing-quantity, or incompatible-unit stock would need to be treated as exact or silently converted.
Projected demand would need to mutate Pantry batches, reserve physical stock, or double-count stock across meals.
Implementation requires migration/schema changes, grocery recommendation changes, cooking deductions, or files outside allowed_files.
Any change would overwrite concurrent nutrition, reaction, planner redesign, or unrelated user work; merge precisely or stop with the conflicting path.
Production build would require taking ownership of another task's live Next dev process or shared .next directory.

missing_evidence: Production build after the concurrent Next dev process releases .next.
Recipe availability, projected demand, grocery, purchase, cooking, leftovers, and rendered acceptance.
required_board_updates: Mark T008 done and activate T009 from worker_package.
Require a calculation-correctness Judge after T009 before grocery/cooking integration.
